events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) installation at rough-complete stage. The photos show the installed work following the referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations are in place. The inspection card has no open correction notes. Reference material is OSHA 1910.147.

This appears to be a compliant condition - everything is in place, no defects noted. The decision should be "pass" with low risk.
